code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut line = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line = s
  when None
    line = ""
  end

  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    end
    mut b = 0
    if not is_end
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        b = x
      when None
        b = 0
      end
    end

    if not is_end and b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if not is_end and b == 45
      sign = -1
    else if not is_end and b == 43
      sign = 1
    else
      if has
        let v = sign * cur
        if v > 0
          total = total + v
        else if v < 0
          total = total - v
        end
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      has = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("r=#{total}")
end
